meta.name: Universal Stopper®
meta.description: Protective enclosure for push buttons and switches
meta.heroDescription:
Dome polycarbonate enclosure for manual call points, emergency push buttons, control panels and electrical devices. IP54-rated configurations provide protection against impact, dust ingress and water splashes.

Available with optional marked hood, sounder with relay and multiple colour and marking configurations. Supports flush, surface and coloured spacer mounting.

Intended for indoor and outdoor installations requiring protection against unauthorised access or accidental activation.

options.1: #1 Surface mount with transparent spacer (Dual Mount)

options.30: #30 Marked hood with sounder and relay
